Event: Cashback 2025
Event Date: 01/12/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: AM279
Snow Glow Amulet

Once in a while, the unit removes movement-restricting effects, stun, freeze, petrification, jelly, and fear from 3 random allied units, also increasing their incoming and outgoing healing by 60% for 4 sec. Improved restoration is cast on them as well: the targets have 3 random negative effects removed from them, and they restore 25% health. They also have all their stats increased by 20% for 4 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet

First trigger: 3 sec

Cooldown: 9 secs
